entry.title: RFEBKA00 not clearing Documents
entry.content:
We were originally on ECC and upgrade to S4 1 - 2 years ago.  Everything is working fine with RFEBKA00 and clearing documents properly with Banks that were set up before the S4 conversion. 

Now we have added a new bank.  We copied an existing pre processing program that calls RFEBKA00, because we needed to remove the leading zeros from the checks.  When running this new program,  the checks are marked as cashed, but not clearing and making the entry.  

Because we are using the same variant in RFEBKA00 as other banks that are working, I am thinking that end should be configured correctly.  

TCode OT83 is created consistent with the other banks, and FBZP looks consistent with the Account Numbers. 

I am wondering if there is another piece of configuration (may different between ECC and S4) that is missing.  

Thanks in advance for any guidance you can provide.

entry.title: Unable to pass Debited account into BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are creating payment requests programmatically using the BAPI_PAYMENTREQUEST_CREATE to update the table PAYRQ. However, we are unable to update the debited account for the payment requests to the table PAYRQC-KONTO since there is no parameter in the BAPI to pass this information. 

 

Is there any way that the debited account can be updated for payment requests programmatically?

 

 

 

Regards,

entry.title: cost center blocked against revenue postings at the time of payment f110
entry.content: at the of payment of vendor bills through t-code F110 there is an error  cost center blocked against revenue postings  but in purchase order there is no cost center updated how system will throw this error

entry.title: issue with production liters
entry.content:
Hello Team Good Morning,

I have a doubt on Process order concepts and production orders, one of my client having an issue with orders, in KEU1  I created a CO-PA assessment Cycle based on , Sender is the one cost center and One cost element and Receivers , i am taking here product (Finished Good ), orders created in the t.code (COR1 ) and also taking the Division. when i am executing the Cycle in KEU5 its giving an error there no receivers.

and i taken as a base in Receiver Tracing factor is Cost Of Goods manufactured account.

here i am giving the some screenshots for your reference please advice me how i can allocate the cost based on process orders here my client is using the Account Based CO-PA.

 

 

 

 

 

KEU5 i am not the tracing factor in Quantity as i given in orders. how i can do this .please solve the issue

KEU5 execution i am getting these errors.

why its not allocating the cost based on COGM a/c please give proper solution for this issue.

entry.title: Could Not performe a simple Excel export.
entry.content:
Dear Support : 

when we select the following informations, 

 

FBL3N - Accounts: 63000000 -73999999
Formatting /AZZAB2

we cannot export them to excel, we have this the error "XSLT: No valid xml source. ", like if the system confuse between excel and xml the moment of the export: 
we cannot export to excel with the error : invalid xml source. 

Do you have any suggestions about this issue? 

Regards,

entry.title: SRM transfer shopping cart to ECC
entry.content: We have a few shopping carts that did not update accounting in ECC.  They are not stored in MM in ECC, just accounting impact.  They seem to all be deleted lines.  /SAPPSSRM/SC_COMMIT_REPOST does not work.  We have seen note 3473514 and are working on testing it.  Our change management process takes some time to get things to production so we are looking for something we may be able to use ASAP.  Any thoughts welcome, thank you!

entry.title: how do i use alternative posting keys for customer line items in a BAPI posting to create FI doc?
entry.content:
hi, 

I'm writing an ABAP to post a customer document in FI, that contain other GL / Tax items. 

i need to use a different posting key (other than default  11 for a credit to a customer line). 

I would like to use '14' for the credit. 

 

I used: 

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST'
  EXPORTING
    documentheader = wa_header
  TABLES
    accountreceivable = lt_accountrec
    accountgl      = lt_accountgl
    currencyamount = lt_item_currency
    accounttax     = lt_item_tax
    return         = lt_return.

 

where

 lt_accountgl        TYPE TABLE OF bapiacgl09,
      lt_item_currency  TYPE TABLE OF bapiaccr09,
      lt_accountrec     TYPE TABLE OF bapiacar09,
      lt_extension        TYPE TABLE OF bapiextc ,
      lt_item_tax       TYPE TABLE OF bapiactx09,
      lt_return         TYPE TABLE OF bapiret2. 

 

 

i used EXTENSION  to populate bschl (posting key) of the customer line item in my document. 

while moving through the BAPI, I saw that ACCIT had the posting key substituted for the customer line (based on the extension), and it was carried through in T_ACCIT / C_ACCIT tables while moving through BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST. But eventually, there was a function CHECK_AND_FILL_ACC_DOCUMENT. 

in here, 

PERFORM fill_bapi_accit 

TABLES account_receivable....

account_gl...

currency_amount... 

Only pure GL items remain in the account_gl table.

The posting key that i wanted for the customer line disappeared.  Consequently, when the document was posted, i did not have '14' as the credit posting key. It was the default '11' instead. 

Does any one know how i can push in my own posting key for customer line?

I'm using ECC 6 EHP 8.

entry.title: How can i control/limit my user using one time vendor to post transaction?
entry.content: My user use one time vendor as an alternative to not creating the customer/ vendor account in business partner. It is not fullfill the audit compliance as same vendor can be using as many times to post invoices by using one time vendor. Any config can be set to to limit the usage / repetition of using OTV?

entry.title: can you add custom field(available on MIRO) in FS10N layout?
entry.content:
can you add custom field(available on MIRO) in FS10N layout?

We tried through BTE 1650,1120 but its not getting called during FS10n.

We cant add a RBKP field in O7R3 as well.

Anyone handled similar requirement?

entry.title: Fiscal Representative and Plant Abroad in SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

In SAP ECC we have this Concept of 'Fiscal Representative and Plant Abroad'.

In SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition, I guess 'RITA' is the equivalent process for Plant Abroad but for the Fiscal Representative we are not able to identify any similar process or relevant configuration in SAP Cloud.

So, is there any equivalent process or configurations for Fiscal Representative in SAP Public Cloud and if not, what Alternative solution exist for this scenario in Cloud?

Thank You,

Amar Modanwal.

entry.title: Chart of Accounts: Changing Length of G/L Account Number
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

What would be the impact of changing the G/L account number length e.g. from 7 to 10 in the chart of accounts settings? Does this require a larger project due to the associated changes required in other tables?

Best regards,
Kaiwen

entry.title: Display the "header" column in the same row than "position" column
entry.content: I ran the MB5L report (Display Warehouse Stocks of Material) and would like to have "header" column on the same row than "position" column. Right now, my "Header" column is above my "position" column which make the data processing difficult. Thanks in advance for your help.

entry.title: S4/HANA, CJI3N, display asset number involved in cost line items
entry.content:
Hi experts, need you help please!

Is there a way to display asset number involved in cost line items with CJI3N transaction code or with any other transaction code ? Thank you! 

Ex : I have my PO assigned to a wbs element, wbs linked to AUC, when I run settlement the costs are assigned to AUC. Now when using the CJI3N reports I need to see the AUC number without double clicking on cost line item....

Is there an other transaction code offering this ? 

Thank you!

entry.title: Credit segment change for sales area
entry.content:
Hi,

Client wants to change credit segment assigned to a sales area / company code. But there are 2 years worth of transactional data in the system for this entity. What would be the impacts of changing the credit segment now for open orders, master data, invoices posted, etc.?

FIN (Finance) #credit management #FSCM

Regards,
Vishnu

entry.title: Process order settlement with actual quantity
entry.content:
Dear Experts.

we are into Processing industry and our business scenario is that we will make a standard BOM with Co Products. One Input and multiple Output, we will provide in the equivalence in MM, while processing the order there may be chance that few output co product will not get process and this result in PRD. At the time of ML, this PRD is not allocated to material since no output quantity resulting in non allocated or not distributed PRD. Now our business want to allocate this PRD to other products during the month end.

Please suggest the best way allocate this PRD. We are in SAP S4 1909

entry.title: Budget Transfer Error - Budget is negative
entry.content:
Good Day Experts.

I am having challenges on budget transfer, i recently configured the system not to allow negative budget transfers using Check Libraries already defined by SAP in the SAP NOTE: 983853 as shown by the screenshots below.  My challenge is even if i want to transfer amounts which are not negative i still get the budget is negative message. Kindly assist,

entry.title: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupted before the end date
entry.content:
Dear SAP team, 

we would like to be sure to have all the needed Flow type customized in our system, so I am writing to ask which is the proper one the system will trigger in case of an interruption during the life the contract life?  That means the contract"s life is stopped before its end date. In this case we expected a loss due to asset retirement so the Flow type should manage the Lease Debit versus Loss gl account. 

Thanks a lot in advance for your smart support

Regards

Donatella

entry.title: How to create the Credit Management (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408)
entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Vendor: Withholding Tax NOT extended in new company code
entry.content:
Hi,

I have the next issue, when I create an existing supplier for a new company code in the BP tcode.


In the company code data section, I select "create with reference" but then upon entering, I check Vendor: Withholding Tax and the data isnt replicated in the new company code.

In ECC this situation didnt occur with tcode XK01 created as a model.

Please, I need to understand if it is possible in S/4

Thanks

entry.title: Hi,
entry.content:
why chart of accounts and fiscal year variant must be same for two company codes to assign them to a single controlling area?

Regards.

Sirisha
